title: justicia phyllocalyx
intro: Justicia phyllocalyx, also known as the Mexican honeysuckle or coral honeysuckle, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which contain alkaloids and flavonoids that have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Justicia phyllocalyx include its potential to reduce inflammation, lower blood pressure, and exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of Justicia phyllocalyx can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are traditionally used to treat conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and skin problems.
